src/main/App.java.general_idea: Replace inline Javalin configuration and route registration with a centralized AppConfig factory method.
Remove imports for Javalin, Dotenv, and controllers that are no longer used in the main class.
src/main/App.java.human_impl: Removed imports for io.javalin.Javalin, io.github.cdimascio.dotenv.Dotenv, etc.

src/main/App.java.general_idea: Remove the hardcoded ASYNC_TIME_OUT constant as configuration is now handled by AppConfig.
Remove the large block comment describing the server API endpoints from the main class.
src/main/App.java.human_impl: Removed the multi-line comment block describing /login, /organization-signup, etc.

src/main/Config/MongoConfig.java.general_idea: Replace deprecated legacy MongoClient with the modern synchronous driver API (MongoClients) to ensure compatibility with Java 21 and current driver versions.
src/main/Config/MongoConfig.java.human_impl: import com.mongodb.client.MongoClient; import com.mongodb.client.MongoClients; ... client = MongoClients.create(clientSettings);

src/main/Config/MongoConfig.java.general_idea: Update connection string handling from MongoClientURI to ConnectionString to align with the new driver API.
src/main/Config/MongoConfig.java.human_impl: import com.mongodb.ConnectionString; ... ConnectionString connectionString = new ConnectionString(MONGO_URI);

src/main/Config/MongoConfig.java.general_idea: Refactor codec registration to use the new CodecRegistry builder pattern required by the modern driver.
Enable automatic POJO encoding/decoding using the new PojoCodecProvider builder.
Replace dotenv library usage with direct System.getenv calls for environment variable retrieval.
src/main/Config/MongoConfig.java.human_impl: import java.util.Objects; ... public static final String MONGO_URI = Objects.requireNonNull(System.getenv("MONGO_URI"));

src/main/Config/MongoConfig.java.general_idea: Define explicit constants for database names per deployment environment.
Implement logic to select the correct database instance based on a DeploymentLevel enum.
Add explicit methods for closing the client connection and dropping databases for better resource management.
src/main/Config/MongoConfig.java.human_impl: public static void closeClientConnection() { client.close(); } ... public static void dropDatabase(...) { db.drop(); }

src/main/Organization/OrgEnrollmentStatu.general_idea: Refactor enum to implement a Message interface and store descriptive error strings for each status.
src/main/Organization/OrgEnrollmentStatu.human_impl: implements Message { ORG_EXISTS("ORG_EXISTS: Organization Exists Already"), ... }

src/main/Organization/OrgEnrollmentStatu.general_idea: Add import for org.json.JSONObject to support JSON serialization of status messages.
Add helper methods to convert the enum status into a JSON object response.
Add helper methods to parse the error name and description from the stored message string.
Add new enum constants for INVALID_PARAMETER, FAIL_TO_CREATE, and SUCCESS to handle additional enrollment outcomes.
src/main/Organization/OrgEnrollmentStatu.human_impl: INVALID_PARAMETER("INVALID_PARAMETER: Please Check Input"), FAIL_TO_CREATE("Could not create user and/or org"), SUCCESS("SUCCESS: Success");

src/main/Organization/OrgEnrollmentStatu.general_idea: Remove specific invalid character enum constants in favor of a generic INVALID_CHARACTERS constant.

src/main/Organization/OrganizationContro.general_idea: Convert static handler methods into instance methods within a class to enable dependency injection.
src/main/Organization/OrganizationContro.human_impl: public class OrganizationController { MongoDatabase db; ... public OrganizationController(MongoDatabase db, ...) { ... } }

src/main/Organization/OrganizationContro.general_idea: Inject MongoDatabase and ActivityDao via constructor to decouple controller from static configuration.
src/main/Organization/OrganizationContro.human_impl: public OrganizationController(MongoDatabase db, ActivityDao activityDao) { this.db = db; this.activityDao = activityDao; }

src/main/Organization/OrganizationContro.general_idea: Replace manual logger initialization with Lombok @Slf4j annotation for cleaner code.
Extract member finding logic into a dedicated FindMemberService class.
src/main/Organization/OrganizationContro.human_impl: FindMemberService fm = new FindMemberService(db, userTypes, orgs); Message message = fm.executeAndGetResponse();

src/main/Organization/OrganizationContro.general_idea: Extract organization listing logic into a dedicated ListOrgsService class.
src/main/Organization/OrganizationContro.human_impl: ListOrgsService loservice = new ListOrgsService(db); Message message = loservice.executeAndGetResponse();

src/main/Organization/OrganizationContro.general_idea: Extract organization enrollment logic into a dedicated EnrollOrganizationService class.
src/main/Organization/OrganizationContro.human_impl: EnrollOrganizationService eos = new EnrollOrganizationService(db, req, encryptionUtils, activityDao);

src/main/Organization/OrganizationContro.general_idea: Extract user invitation logic into a dedicated InviteUserService class.
src/main/Organization/OrganizationContro.human_impl: InviteUserService ius = new InviteUserService(db, req, encryptionUtils, activityDao);

src/main/Organization/OrganizationContro.general_idea: Remove direct usage of Argon2 library in controller, delegating hashing to services/utils.
src/main/Organization/OrganizationContro.human_impl: Removed import de.mkammerer.argon2.Argon2; and Argon2Factory.create() calls.

src/main/Organization/OrganizationContro.general_idea: Remove direct usage of Auth0 JWT library in controller, delegating token handling to services/utils.
src/main/Organization/OrganizationContro.human_impl: Removed import com.auth0.jwt.JWT; and JWT.create() calls.

src/main/Organization/OrganizationContro.general_idea: Standardize API error responses using a unified Message object structure.
Define constants for environment variables used in organization enrollment.
Inject EncryptionUtils instance for handling encryption tasks within the controller.

src/main/User/UserController.java.general_idea: Replace static field access and inline MongoDB client instantiation with constructor-based dependency injection for DAOs and database connections.
src/main/User/UserController.java.human_impl: public UserController(UserDao userDao, TokenDao tokenDao, ...) { this.userDao = userDao; ... }

src/main/User/UserController.java.general_idea: Add Lombok @Slf4j annotation to enable automatic logger injection, replacing manual logging or lack thereof.
Implement a new HTTP handler to parse a CSV file and automatically create user accounts based on the records.
src/main/User/UserController.java.human_impl: public Handler ingestCsv = ctx -> { ... BufferedReader br = new BufferedReader(new FileReader(csvName)) ... }

src/main/User/UserController.java.general_idea: Refactor the login handler to use injected DAOs for authentication instead of direct MongoDB queries and Argon2 library calls.
Remove imports for deprecated or unused libraries such as Auth0 JWT, Argon2, and raw MongoDB drivers.
Add imports for new service classes and DAOs used in the refactored controller.

src/main/User/UserMessage.java.general_idea: Make UserMessage implement the Message interface to standardize message handling.
Add import for org.json.JSONObject to support JSON serialization.
Add INVALID_PARAMETER enum constant for parameter validation errors.
Add SERVER_ERROR enum constant for generic server errors.
src/main/User/UserMessage.java.human_impl: SERVER_ERROR("SERVER_ERROR:There was an error with the server.")

src/main/User/UserMessage.java.general_idea: Add INSUFFICIENT_PRIVILEGE enum constant for authorization errors.
Add INVALID_PRIVILEGE_TYPE enum constant for invalid privilege types.
Add SUCCESS enum constant for successful operations.
Add TOKEN_ISSUED enum constant for token issuance events.
Add EMPTY_FIELD enum constant for empty field validation.
Add EMAIL_DOES_NOT_EXIST enum constant for missing email errors.
Add CROSS_ORG_ACTION_DENIED enum constant for cross-organization access denial.
src/main/User/UserMessage.java.human_impl: CROSS_ORG_ACTION_DENIED("CROSS_ORG_ACTION_DENIED:You are trying to access another organization's client information")

src/main/User/UserMessage.java.general_idea: Remove DIFFERENT_ORGANIZATION enum constant as it is replaced by CROSS_ORG_ACTION_DENIED.
src/main/User/UserMessage.java.human_impl: - DIFFERENT_ORGANIZATION("DIFFERENT_ORGANIZATION:Cannot enroll someone in an organization different from your own.")

src/main/User/UserMessage.java.general_idea: Fix typo in NONADMIN_ENROLL_ADMIN error code from NONDMIN_ENROLL_AADMIN to NONADMIN_ENROLL_ADMIN.
Update SESSION_TOKEN_FAILURE message to be more generic.
Change errorMessage field visibility from public to private for encapsulation.
Rename toString to toResponseString to avoid overriding Object.toString and clarify intent.
Add withMessage method to allow dynamic message customization.
src/main/User/UserMessage.java.human_impl: public Message withMessage(String message) { this.errorMessage = getErrorName() + ":" + message; return this; }

src/main/User/UserMessage.java.general_idea: Add toJSON method to serialize the message to a JSONObject.
src/main/User/UserMessage.java.human_impl: public JSONObject toJSON() { JSONObject res = new JSONObject(); res.put("status", getErrorName()); res.put("message", getErrorDescription()); return res; }

src/main/User/UserMessage.java.general_idea: Add overloaded toJSON method to serialize with a custom message.
src/main/User/UserMessage.java.human_impl: public JSONObject toJSON(String message) { JSONObject res = new JSONObject(); res.put("status", getErrorName()); res.put("message", message); return res; }

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties to Java 21.
Add JAXB API dependency required because it was removed from the JDK module system in Java 11+.
Add JNA dependency for native platform access.
Add Lob Java SDK for mail form services.
Add Apache Commons IO for file handling utilities.
Add Google Tink GCP KMS integration for encryption.
Add Google Tink core library for cryptographic operations.
Add Google HTTP Client Jackson2 integration for API communication.
Add JSON Simple library for JSON parsing.
Add Apache Commons Text for string manipulation.
Add IPInfo API client for IP geolocation.
Add JJWT library for JWT token handling.
Add Apache Commons Lang3 for general utility methods.
Remove Heroku Maven plugin configuration.
Add Maven Surefire plugin for test execution.
Add JaCoCo plugin for code coverage reporting.
Update Maven compiler plugin to a newer version compatible with Java 21.
Explicitly define source and test source directories in build configuration.
Define resource and test resource directories for build packaging.
Configure Maven Assembly plugin to create jar-with-dependencies during package phase.
Remove Maven dependency plugin copy-dependencies execution.
Remove Javalin web framework dependency.
Remove SLF4J API and Simple binding dependencies.
Remove Java Dotenv dependency for environment variable loading.
Remove PowerMock version property.
Explicitly set project packaging type to jar.
Set project build source encoding to UTF-8.

Procfile.general_idea: Remove the explicit -Dfile.encoding=UTF-8 JVM argument because UTF-8 is the default file encoding in Java 21.
